name: massive-mcp
description: Real-time web access for AI agents — fetch any URL, search Google, query AI chatbots — with JS rendering, captcha solving, and 195+ country geo-targeting.
long_description: Official MCP server for the Massive Web Render API. Four tools: web_fetch (any URL → Markdown/HTML), web_search (parsed Google SERP), ai_chat_completion (ChatGPT/Gemini/Perplexity/Copilot with sources), account_status (credits remaining). Pay-as-you-go pricing — see https://joinmassive.com/pricing. Compatible with Claude Desktop, Cursor, Continue, Cody, Windsurf, and any MCP-compatible client.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch any URL through Massive — returns rendered HTML, raw HTML, or Markdown.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Google search results parsed into structured JSON.

tools.name: ai_chat_completion
tools.description: Get a chatbot answer with structured sources.

prompts.name: web_search_full
prompts.description: Google search: top 10 organic results, AI overview, and people-also-asked.
prompts.text: Use web_search to search Google for "{topic}". List the top 10 organic results (title, URL, snippet), the AI overview (with sources) if present, and the people-also-asked questions.

prompts.name: web_fetch_markdown
prompts.text: Use web_fetch on {url} with format=markdown. Show me the full Markdown content.

prompts.name: ai_chat_full
prompts.description: Ask a chatbot (ChatGPT/Gemini/Perplexity/Copilot) and show answer + sources.
prompts.text: Use ai_chat_completion with model={model} to ask: "{topic}". Show the full answer, all sources, and any subqueries the model used.

prompts.name: account_check
prompts.text: Call account_status. Report my remaining credits and the low-balance flag; if low_balance is true, share the top-up link.
